name: tinypowers
description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works: planning, TDD, debugging, and collaboration workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, TDD, debugging, and delivery workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Tinypowers to guide agent work through implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, and completion verification.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
